items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Alonso on three-man Chelsea manager shortlist
items.summary: Xabi Alonso is reportedly on Chelsea's shortlist to be their next manager, while Arsenal are interested in Victor Osimhen. Transfer Talk has the latest.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: No denying Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s greatness, but put some respect on Manu Bhaker’s name
items.summary: Cricket’s popularity in India is unmatched, but Olympic excellence deserves equal respect. Manu Bhaker’s multiple-medal feat is a rare benchmark of composure.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Sabastian Sawe’s sub-two marathon feat is the Roger Bannister moment of our time | Sean Ingle
items.summary: Sunday’s landmark in London was not only unexpected, dramatic and historic – it was a once-in-a-generation moment A few years ago at the London Marathon, organisers wheeled out...
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.
